title: Stop testing your SAAS manually
summary: KaneAI is an AI-powered testing tool that automates QA for SaaS applications. Users describe tests in plain English; the system generates, runs, and validates them automatically, reducing testing costs and team overhead.
writeup: This video presents KaneAI, an AI-powered testing tool that automates QA for SaaS applications. Tests are described in plain English, and the system generates, runs, and validates them automatically. The stated benefits are reduced testing costs and lower team overhead. It draws on workflow automation, browser automation, code generation, and AI agents.
